goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: Late old-key intake completions are explicitly stale and valueless; the component rechecks the expected current key before every UI update. A controlled-promise regression proves current success rotation followed by ignored late old success. All prior retry and server idempotency behavior remains intact.
remaining_blockers: Isolated build, rendered workflow, accessibility, migration, and final-oracle evidence remain.
